content.scenarioHint: 顾客进店问候并询问商品有无
expectedAnswers: Do you have the chicken sandwich?
And do you have the chicken sandwich?
Excuse me, do you have chicken sandwiches?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词正确
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 顾客通常先发起询问，如询问商品信息或价格
expectedAnswers: Excuse me, do you have any new arrivals?
Hey, do you have any fresh orange juice?
Hi, can you tell me if you have any discounts on your products?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: Hi, do you have any fresh bread today?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，今天有新鲜面包吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we do! It's fresh from the oven just now.
Sorry, we sold out by noon.
We have sourdough and whole wheat—both fresh today.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应库存状态（有/无）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'fresh', 'in stock', 'sold out'
是否提供了额外有用信息（如种类、位置），体现服务意识
